section_miscategorizations.text: although a negative mammogram in January 2021 was reported.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a prior diagnostic test result (objective data). While it is being referenced to support the assessment, the content itself is an imaging result and would more strictly belong in the Objective section.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of invasive ductal carcinoma.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Past medical history is typically patient-reported subjective history unless specifically documented as a chart review; here it is presented as background history rather than an interpretive assessment.
